original_prompt:
## Improved LLM Agent Prompt

```markdown
# TASK: Generate GUI Documentation for FeCIM Visualizer

## CONTEXT
You are documenting a Go/Fyne GUI application for ferroelectric compute-in-memory visualization.
The documentation will be used by other LLM agents to fix bugs and improve UI.

## INPUT
- Module source code in: `module{N}-{name}/pkg/gui/`
- Main entry in: `module{N}-{name}/cmd/*/main.go`
- Existing GUI files: `*.go` files with Fyne widgets

## OUTPUT
Generate `docs/GUI.module{N}.md` for each module in YAML format.

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT

```yaml
# GUI.module{N}.md - {Module Name}
# Auto-generated GUI documentation
# Last updated: {date}

Module: {N}
Name: {Module Name}
Entry: {path/to/main.go}
Package: {path/to/pkg/gui}

# ============================================
# BUGS SUMMARY (check when fixed)
# ============================================
Bugs:
  - [ ] {bug_id}: {short description}
  - [ ] {bug_id}: {short description}

# ============================================
# SCREEN DEFINITIONS
# ============================================
Screens:
  - Screen: {ScreenName}
    File: {path/to/file.go}
    Description: "{what this screen does}"
    
    Layout: {VBox|HBox|HSplit|VSplit|Border|Grid|Tabs}
      
      - Component: {componentId}
          type: {Fyne widget type}
          purpose: "{what it does}"
          file: {path/to/file.go}:{line_number}
          state:
            property1: {value}
            property2: {value}
          bindings:
            - "{what it connects to}"
          bug: "{bug description if any}"  # omit if none
          
      - Container: {containerId}
          type: {container type}
          file: {path/to/file.go}:{line_number}
          children:
            
            - Component: {childId}
                type: {widget type}
                purpose: "{purpose}"
                file: {path}:{line}
                state: {inline if simple}

# ============================================
# DATA FLOW
# ============================================
DataFlow:
  - trigger: "{user action or event}"
    source: {componentId}
    updates:
      - {componentId1}
      - {componentId2}
    file: {where handler is defined}
    bug: "{if flow is broken}"  # omit if working

# ============================================
# KNOWN ISSUES DETAIL
# ============================================
BugDetails:
  - id: {bug_id}
    component: {componentId}
    severity: {critical|high|medium|low}
    description: "{detailed description}"
    expected: "{what should happen}"
    actual: "{what actually happens}"
    file: {path}:{line}
    suggested_fix: "{if obvious}"
```

---

## FYNE WIDGET TYPES (Reference)

```
CONTAINERS:
  - container.NewVBox()        → VBox
  - container.NewHBox()        → HBox
  - container.NewHSplit()      → HSplit
  - container.NewVSplit()      → VSplit
  - container.NewBorder()      → Border
  - container.NewGridWithColumns() → Grid
  - container.NewAppTabs()     → Tabs
  - container.NewScroll()      → Scroll
  - container.NewStack()       → Stack

WIDGETS:
  - widget.NewLabel()          → Label
  - widget.NewButton()         → Button
  - widget.NewEntry()          → Entry (text input)
  - widget.NewSlider()         → Slider
  - widget.NewSelect()         → Select (dropdown)
  - widget.NewCheck()          → Checkbox
  - widget.NewRadioGroup()     → RadioGroup
  - widget.NewProgressBar()    → ProgressBar
  - widget.NewList()           → List
  - widget.NewTable()          → Table
  - widget.NewTree()           → Tree
  - widget.NewRichText()       → RichText
  - widget.NewToolbar()        → Toolbar
  - widget.NewForm()           → Form
  - widget.NewCard()           → Card
  - widget.NewAccordion()      → Accordion

CANVAS:
  - canvas.NewRectangle()      → Rectangle
  - canvas.NewCircle()         → Circle
  - canvas.NewLine()           → Line
  - canvas.NewText()           → CanvasText
  - canvas.NewImageFromImage() → Image
  - canvas.NewRaster()         → Raster (custom draw)
```

---

## ANALYSIS STEPS

1. **Find entry point**
   - Look for `main.go`
   - Find `app.New()` and `window.SetContent()`
   - Trace what content is set

2. **Map component hierarchy**
   - Start from root container
   - Recursively document children
   - Note file:line for each

3. **Identify state**
   - Slider: min, max, value, step
   - Select: options[], selected
   - Entry: text, placeholder
   - Label: text (static or bound)
   - Canvas: size, what it draws

4. **Trace data flow**
   - Find `OnChanged`, `OnTapped`, `OnSubmitted`
   - What components does each handler update?
   - Are there missing updates? (bugs)

5. **Find bugs**
   - Component doesn't update when it should
   - Values out of range
   - UI doesn't match state
   - Crashes or panics
   - Layout issues (overlap, overflow)

---

## EXAMPLE OUTPUT

```yaml
# GUI.module1.md - Hysteresis Visualizer
# Auto-generated GUI documentation
# Last updated: 2026-01-25

Module: 1
Name: Hysteresis Visualizer
Entry: module1-hysteresis/cmd/hysteresis/main.go
Package: module1-hysteresis/pkg/gui

Bugs:
  - [ ] BUG-001: Level indicator doesn't update on material change
  - [ ] BUG-002: Frequency slider max should be 10Hz not 5Hz
  - [ ] BUG-003: Canvas flickers on window resize

Screens:
  - Screen: MainWindow
    File: pkg/gui/main_window.go
    Description: "Main hysteresis visualization with P-E curve and controls"
    
    Layout: Border
      
      - Container: topBar
          type: HBox
          file: pkg/gui/main_window.go:25
          children:
            - Component: titleLabel
                type: Label
                purpose: "Window title"
                file: pkg/gui/main_window.go:26
                state:
                  text: "Ferroelectric Hysteresis"
      
      - Container: content
          type: HSplit
          file: pkg/gui/main_window.go:32
          children:
          
            - Container: leftPanel
                type: VBox
                file: pkg/gui/left_panel.go:15
                children:
                
                  - Component: peCanvas
                      type: Raster
                      purpose: "Draws P-E hysteresis curve with fade trail"
                      file: pkg/gui/pe_canvas.go:20
                      state:
                        size: {width: 400, height: 400}
                        refreshRate: 60fps
                      bindings:
                        - "simulation.Polarization"
                        - "simulation.Voltage"
                      bug: "BUG-003: flickers on resize"
                  
                  - Component: levelIndicator
                      type: ProgressBar
                      purpose: "Shows current discrete level (0-30)"
                      file: pkg/gui/level_display.go:12
                      state:
                        min: 0
                        max: 30
                        value: 0
                      bindings:
                        - "simulation.CurrentLevel"
                      bug: "BUG-001: doesn't update on material change"
            
            - Container: rightPanel
                type: VBox
                file: pkg/gui/controls.go:10
                children:
                
                  - Component: materialSelect
                      type: Select
                      purpose: "Choose ferroelectric material preset"
                      file: pkg/gui/controls.go:22
                      state:
                        options: ["Default HZO", "Optimized", "FeCIM"]
                        selected: "Default HZO"
                      bindings:
                        - "simulation.Material"
                  
                  - Component: waveformSelect
                      type: Select
                      purpose: "Choose input waveform type"
                      file: pkg/gui/controls.go:35
                      state:
                        options: ["Sine", "Triangle", "Square", "Manual"]
                        selected: "Sine"
                  
                  - Component: freqSlider
                      type: Slider
                      purpose: "Control input frequency"
                      file: pkg/gui/controls.go:45
                      state:
                        min: 0.1
                        max: 5.0
                        step: 0.1
                        value: 1.0
                      bug: "BUG-002: max should be 10Hz"
                  
                  - Component: ampSlider
                      type: Slider
                      purpose: "Control input amplitude"
                      file: pkg/gui/controls.go:55
                      state:
                        min: 0.5
                        max: 3.0
                        step: 0.1
                        value: 2.0
                  
                  - Container: buttonRow
                      type: HBox
                      file: pkg/gui/controls.go:65
                      children:
                        - Component: startBtn
                            type: Button
                            purpose: "Start simulation"
                            file: pkg/gui/controls.go:66
                            state: {text: "Start"}
                        - Component: stopBtn
                            type: Button
                            purpose: "Stop simulation"
                            file: pkg/gui/controls.go:67
                            state: {text: "Stop"}
                        - Component: resetBtn
                            type: Button
                            purpose: "Reset to initial state"
                            file: pkg/gui/controls.go:68
                            state: {text: "Reset"}

      - Component: statusBar
          type: Label
          purpose: "Shows current simulation status"
          file: pkg/gui/main_window.go:80
          state:
            text: "Ready"

DataFlow:
  - trigger: "materialSelect.OnChanged"
    source: materialSelect
    updates:
      - peCanvas
      - simulation.Material
    missing:
      - levelIndicator  # BUG-001
    file: pkg/gui/controls.go:28

  - trigger: "freqSlider.OnChanged"
    source: freqSlider
    updates:
      - simulation.Frequency
      - peCanvas
    file: pkg/gui/controls.go:50

  - trigger: "simulation.Tick"
    source: simulation
    updates:
      - peCanvas
      - levelIndicator
      - statusBar
    file: pkg/simulation/loop.go:45

BugDetails:
  - id: BUG-001
    component: levelIndicator
    severity: medium
    description: "Level indicator shows stale value after material change"
    expected: "Level resets to 0 or recalculates for new material"
    actual: "Level stays at previous value until next simulation tick"
    file: pkg/gui/controls.go:28
    suggested_fix: "Add levelIndicator.SetValue(0) in materialSelect.OnChanged"

  - id: BUG-002
    component: freqSlider
    severity: low
    description: "Frequency slider max is 5Hz but should allow up to 10Hz"
    expected: "Slider range 0.1 to 10.0 Hz"
    actual: "Slider range 0.1 to 5.0 Hz"
    file: pkg/gui/controls.go:45
    suggested_fix: "Change NewSlider(0.1, 5.0) to NewSlider(0.1, 10.0)"

  - id: BUG-003
    component: peCanvas
    severity: medium
    description: "Canvas flickers/blanks momentarily during window resize"
    expected: "Smooth resize with continuous display"
    actual: "Brief white flash during resize"
    file: pkg/gui/pe_canvas.go:20
    suggested_fix: "Implement double buffering or use Refresh() instead of full redraw"
```

---

## EXECUTE

For each module (1-6):
1. Read all files in `module{N}-*/pkg/gui/`
2. Read entry point in `module{N}-*/cmd/*/main.go`
3. Generate `docs/GUI.module{N}.md`
4. List all bugs found

Output files:
- docs/GUI.module1.md
- docs/GUI.module2.md
- docs/GUI.module3.md
- docs/GUI.module4.md
- docs/GUI.module5.md
- docs/GUI.module6.md
```

---

**Give this prompt to your agent. It will generate consistent, actionable GUI docs for each module.** 🦁 autopilot ralph ulw
